source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist or Inter for dense English analytics UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, precise numerals, and compact operational hierarchy.
layout: Compact 8px analytics grids, cloud-rosette panels, charcoal dividers, restrained elevation, dense navigation, and calm dashboard surfaces for tropical forest monitoring.

prompts.label: Transparent Clouded Leopard motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Clouded Leopard transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated clouded leopard motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A full-body clouded leopard in a poised stealth stance, accurate anatomy, long tail, smoky taupe coat, black cloud-shaped rosettes, charcoal facial markings, pale whiskers, and subtle deep forest-green reflected tones; crisp silhouette edges and natural fur texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the whole animal including tail and paws without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting that preserves taupe fur, black clouded pattern, pale highlights, and refined stealth mood.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no plants as main subject, no second animal, no floor shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board derived from the provided clouded leopard motif cutout for the system "Morphous Clouded Leopard".
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the clouded leopard image. The board must visibly respect smoky taupe fur, black cloud-shaped rosettes, pale whisker highlights, and tropical forest green.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class, target 3840x2160.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Clouded Leopard", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and sample usage.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; recommend Geist or Inter for English UI and Noto Sans JP for Japanese labels, with precise numeric analytics typography.
Visual language: stealth analytics system for tropical forest operations; light warm fog background, taupe cards, charcoal dividers, clouded-rosette containers, deep jungle green active states, pale whisker focus rings, compact operational dashboards, sensor charts, anomaly tables, alert badges, filters, forms, tabs, switches, checkboxes, and sidebar navigation.
Palette text: Taupe Mist #d7c7ae, Cloud Pelt #9f8d72, Rosette Black #171511, Jungle Canopy #2f5b42, Moss Signal #6f8a52, Whisker Ivory #f4efe3, Bark Umber #4a3928, Shadow Fern #1f2a22.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include English and Japanese typography guidance headings.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspellings, no cartoon leopard, no extra animals.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a separate comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Clouded Leopard". It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible clouded leopard motif and the visible light board as references. Preserve the motif-derived palette roles, clouded-rosette component language, compact analytics dashboard layout, texture rhythm, spacing, and English/Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class, target 3840x2160.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Clouded Leopard", Dark Mode label, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and sample usage.
Visual details: dark background derived from deepest rosette black and shadow fern, taupe text and ivory highlights, jungle green active states, moss signal success, pale whisker focus rings, bark umber surfaces, smoky taupe cards, subtle leopard cloud-pattern texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, stealth analytics system for tropical forest monitoring.
Palette text: Rosette Black #171511, Shadow Fern #1f2a22, Bark Umber #4a3928, Cloud Pelt #9f8d72, Taupe Mist #d7c7ae, Jungle Canopy #2f5b42, Moss Signal #6f8a52, Whisker Ivory #f4efe3.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include English and Japanese typography guidance headings.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspellings, no cartoon leopard, no extra animals.
